validated_commands.quick_start: uv sync --frozen && uv run pytest -m "not slow" && uv run mypy
validated_commands.cython_branch_build: git checkout experiment-cythonize-filters && uv sync --frozen && uv run python setup.py build_ext --inplace
notes: uv installable via curl; needs PATH update after install
uv sync --frozen installs exact pinned deps from uv.lock
benchmark fixture comes from pytest-codspeed; DO NOT use -p no:codspeed (breaks benchmark tests)
slow marker deselects long-running tests; benchmark tests are NOT marked slow
uv run pytest -m 'not slow' = ~202 passed (2026-05-15 unchanged from 2026-05-14)
PR #128 (merged 2026-05-09): type checking extended to test files; mypy now checks both src/ and tests/
PR #120 (merged 2026-05-14): revert to non-parallel codspeed runs

closed_prs.outcome: MERGED by nocarryr on 2026-05-11. Use math.log10 for scalar path in lk_log10. 1.35x speedup on scalar calls, ~35 µs/s at 48kHz.
MERGED by nocarryr on 2026-05-11. Add BS1770-only meter benchmark (true_peak_enabled=False). Parametrized test_meter_benchmark with pytest.HIDDEN_PARAM.
MERGED by nocarryr on 2026-05-07. Partial zeroing in BlockProcessor.reset(). 40-60x faster reset for short sessions.
MERGED by nocarryr on 2026-05-06. Batch BS1770 filter in write_all. CodSpeed: 88200Hz +23.6%, 96000Hz +17.55%, 44100/48000Hz +11.5%.
MERGED by nocarryr on 2026-05-04. square_and_sum() helper via np.einsum. CodSpeed: integrated +45%, momentary/short_term/lra +35-37%.
MERGED by nocarryr on 2026-05-03. Fused square-sum.

optimization_backlog.desc: Vendoring/trimming _upfirdn_apply.pyx. TruePeak FIR is ~36% of wall-clock time. Maintainer exploring in PR #116.

maintainer_notes: PR #120 (revert-codspeed-parallel) MERGED 2026-05-14: reverts parallel CodSpeed runs due to instability
2026-05-07: Maintainer asked how to run Perf Improver on Cython branch (#116). Responded 2026-05-08 with /perf-assist option, local build steps, and CI workflow approach.
Cython branch build: git checkout experiment-cythonize-filters && uv sync --frozen && uv run python setup.py build_ext --inplace
2026-05-09: Maintainer merged PR #128 (extend type checking to test files) and PR #125 (Test Improver: 2 new tests for auto-process and float32 paths in meter)
IMPORTANT: Always check get_review_comments for all open PRs, not just PR-level comment count.
PR #131 (report-required-checks) open as of 2026-05-13 - maintainer PR, not Perf Improver
perf_notes: CodSpeed threshold ~10% CPU instruction improvement to register as meaningful.
TruePeak FIR dominance: ~36% wall-clock (reduced from ~63% after sosfilt batch PR #119).
lk_log10 scalar: math.log10 is 1.35x faster than np.log10 for scalar np.float64 (490ns -> 364ns). PR #126 merged.
sosfilt batching in write_all: 46 calls -> 1 = 1.85x faster filter step. CodSpeed: +11-23% (PR #119 merged).
BlockProcessor.reset() partial zeroing: ~136 µs full -> ~3 µs for 10-block session (41x). PR #123 merged.
np.einsum('ij,ij->i', a, a) = sum-of-squares without temp array. PR #117: +45%/+35-37% CodSpeed.
RunningSum->float: NO improvement (tested 2026-05-02). Do not retry.
DO NOT use -p no:codspeed when running tests - breaks benchmark fixture.
random_samples fixture uses fixed seed (PR #121 merged) - benchmarks more deterministic.
2026-05-09 code review: processing.py, meter.py, sampling.py - all Python-level hot paths fully optimized. No new opportunities above noise floor.
2026-05-13 infra review: filter benchmarks (test_filters.py) only cover 48kHz; meter benchmarks cover all 4 rates end-to-end. Coverage is adequate.
np.float64 implements __float__ implicitly - no need to wrap math.log10(x) with float(x).
pytest.HIDDEN_PARAM: hides the param id in benchmark names, keeping existing CodSpeed entries intact when adding new parametrize values.
2026-05-14: Slice.slice() overhead ~2µs/call (97 calls/10s) = <200µs total, negligible vs TruePeak FIR. Not worth optimizing.
2026-05-14: write_all RTF: 44100Hz=181x, 48000Hz=172x, 88200Hz=126x, 96000Hz=111x (wall-clock, Python runtime, no Cython).

infrastructure_notes.codspeed_threshold: ~10% CPU instruction improvement to register as meaningful
infrastructure_notes.benchmark_coverage: 22+ benchmarks: block_processor (4 modes), meter (4 rates x 2 true_peak_enabled values after PR #127 merged), TruePeakProcessor (48kHz 4x, 88.2kHz 2x), filter benchmarks (48kHz only, but meter covers all rates end-to-end)
infrastructure_notes.codspeed_instability: PR #120 merged 2026-05-14: reverted parallel CodSpeed runs; now sequential again
